# PixelForge

> PixelForge is a free browser-based image converter for WebP and AVIF.

## Canonical URL

- https://pixelforge.aadiyandubey.me/

## Primary Topics

- online image converter
- WebP converter
- AVIF converter
- PNG to WebP
- JPG to AVIF
- image compression
- batch image conversion

## Key Resources

- [Home](https://pixelforge.aadiyandubey.me/): main landing page and converter
- [LLM Full Summary](https://pixelforge.aadiyandubey.me/llms-full.txt): plain text overview for AI systems
- [Sitemap](https://pixelforge.aadiyandubey.me/sitemap.xml): crawlable URL list

## Summary

- Converts PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, and WebP to WebP or AVIF
- Runs the main conversion flow in the browser
- Supports batch conversion and ZIP downloads
- Free to use with no signup required

## Publisher

- PixelForge
- Author: Aadiyan Dubey
